segments.title: Paper Rex rebounds, eliminates All Gamers in 2-1 fashion
segments.description: Paper Rex lost the first map but won the next two over All Gamers to win the series 2-1 and eliminate the top seed from China at Masters Santiago.
segments.author: weivy

segments.title: G2 Esports dominates, eliminates BBL Esports from Santiago
segments.description: G2 showed it was a level above BBL in a dominant 2-0 sweep.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: NRG gets revenge, sends Paper Rex to lower bracket
segments.description: The defending world champions and the defending Masters winners clashed again, with the former getting revenge.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: Nongshim locks in top three with close 2-1 over G2
segments.description: Nongshim scrapes by G2 to make the upper final.
segments.author: raezeri

segments.title: BiliBili Gaming signs a second rookie to the squad in yilai
segments.description: yilai joins a BiliBili squad that is shorthanded entering Stage 1.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: UNFAKE leaves Team Vitality following stand-in stint
segments.description: After wrapping up his second event with Team Vitality, UNFAKE is a free agent once more.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: PCIFIC Esports parts ways with Leader
segments.description: The head coach departs after just two games under his belt.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: All Gamers sends Gentle Mates home after three maps
segments.description: All Gamers knocks Gentle Mates out with a 2-1 win.
segments.author: thothgow

segments.title: BBL Esports eliminates FURIA in early top seed match
segments.description: BBL Esports defeated FURIA 2-1 in the first playoff elimination match at Masters Santiago, sending the top seed from Americas home.
segments.author: weivy

segments.title: G2 handily defeats All Gamers at Santiago
segments.description: G2 Esports swept All Gamers 2-0 to start these two teams' playoff runs at Masters Santiago. Despite being the top seed from China and choosing G2 as its first opponent, AG lost handily.
segments.author: weivy

segments.title: NRG ekes out map three slugfest over BBL
segments.description: The champs stave off EMEA's first seed.
segments.author: raezeri

segments.title: Nongshim RedForce outpaces Gentle Mates in 2-0 Masters debut
segments.description: The APAC first seed overwhelms M8 to kick off their Santiago run.
segments.author: raezeri

segments.title: Sentinels turn to JonahP for some education
segments.description: The professor is back in class, now lecturing for his former rivals.
segments.author: CongoBat

segments.title: Paper Rex downs FURIA in three-map battle
segments.description: Paper Rex puts a dent in the Americas Cinderella story team's run.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: G2 Esports parts ways with JonahP
segments.description: After over four years on The Guard's core, JonahP has departed G2.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: LOUD adds former LEVIATÁN Academy player erde
segments.description: LOUD expands its roster to six with the addition of erde.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: Opening matchups of Masters Santiago playoffs drawn
segments.description: The top seeds pick their poison to start the playoffs.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: G2 completes 10-2 comeback, sweeps T1 out of Santiago
segments.description: G2 completed a 10-2 comeback on Haven to sweep T1 2-0, eliminating T1 from Masters Santiago and qualifying for the playoff stage.
segments.author: weivy

segments.title: Keiko and NRG claim Santiago playoff spot with 2-0 over Liquid
segments.description: Keiko logs another prime performance to help NRG clinch a win over his former squad.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: G2 eliminates Xi Lai in dominant 2-0
segments.description: G2 are now 1-1 in Swiss after a quick win.
segments.author: raezeri

segments.title: T1 prevails in the Autumn Derby, sends EDward Gaming home
segments.description: EDward Gaming is the first team to be sent home from Masters Santiago.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: Gentle Mates secures playoffs with sweep over Team Liquid
segments.description: In an all-EMEA matchup between two victors in the Masters Santiago Swiss Stage, Gentle Mates swept Team Liquid 2-0 to earn the second available playoff slot.
segments.author: weivy

segments.title: Paper Rex advances to playoffs with nailbiter 2-1 win over NRG
segments.description: The SEA representatives are the first to make it out of Swiss.
segments.author: raezeri

segments.title: Santiago matchups redrawn due to incorrect placements
segments.description: A misplaced team in Santiago's second round drawing resulted in incorrect matchups.
segments.author: ChickenJoe

segments.title: Team Liquid sweeps T1 to end first round of Swiss
segments.description: Team Liquid swept T1 2-0 to add a win to their Swiss Stage rankings, starting Masters Santiago strong.
segments.author: weivy

segments.title: Paper Rex trounces G2 in swift 2-0 series
segments.description: The train makes its first stop in Chile.
segments.author: raezeri

segments.title: NRG sweeps Xi Lai to kick off run at Santiago
segments.description: Despite some shakiness on map two, NRG sweeps Xi Lai Gaming to advance in the Swiss Stage.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: Gentle Mates deconstructs EDG to start Swiss at Santiago
segments.description: In the first game of Masters Santiago, Gentle Mates swept EDward Gaming 2-0 with a one-sided map two and the first Swiss Stage win in their pocket.
segments.author: weivy

segments.title: FENNEL GC announces new roster formed around former ZETA core
segments.description: Four members of the former ZETA 24 squad are now reunited.
segments.author: jenopelle

segments.title: Deryeon leaves Global Esports, joins Motiv Esports
segments.description: After over one year as a member of the Global squad, Deryeon has departed.
segments.author: jenopelle
